name: Deep fake video generation tool
description: Deep fake video generation tool, NOT open source. is_deep_fake_system=true, no disclosure. Art.50(4) must trigger for missing deep fake disclosure.

_scope.is_ai_system_reasoning: GAN-based face swap and video synthesis
_scope.user_role_reasoning: Develops the deep fake generation tool

art6.reasoning: Deep fake generation not in Annex III high-risk categories

art5.legal_basis: Art. 5(1): no prohibited practices detected — deep fake generation itself is not a prohibited practice under Art. 5, all 4 categories checked with high confidence

art6.legal_basis: Art. 6(1)-(2): deep fake generation not explicitly in Annex III high-risk categories (is_high_risk=false) but risk classification confidence is medium — cannot fully determine

art9.legal_basis: Art. 9(1): risk management required only for high-risk AI systems; is_high_risk=false — Art. 9 does not apply to non-high-risk systems

art10.legal_basis: Art. 10(1): data governance required only for high-risk AI systems; is_high_risk=false — Art. 10 does not apply to non-high-risk systems

art12.legal_basis: Art. 12(1): automatic logging required only for high-risk AI systems; is_high_risk=false — Art. 12 does not apply to non-high-risk systems

art13.legal_basis: Art. 13(1): transparency required only for high-risk AI systems; is_high_risk=false — Art. 13 does not apply to non-high-risk systems

art14.legal_basis: Art. 14(1): human oversight required only for high-risk AI systems; is_high_risk=false — Art. 14 does not apply to non-high-risk systems

art15.legal_basis: Art. 15(1): accuracy/robustness required only for high-risk AI systems; is_high_risk=false — Art. 15 does not apply to non-high-risk systems

art50.legal_basis: Art. 50(4): deep fake content must be labelled as artificially generated/manipulated; is_deep_fake_system=true but has_deep_fake_disclosure=false — no disclosure or labelling mechanism found
